Adjust the blocks to swap based on your VRAM, this is a tradeoff between speed and memory usage.


IMPORTANT!
When at least 1 VACE block is swapped, the intermediate outputs are also offloaded reducing VRAM usage considerably

A young girl speaking expressively wearing a red meditation robe with perfect natural lip sync, crystal-clear articulation, smooth and accurate mouth movements precisely matching speech audio, emotional and varied facial expressions, subtle cheek and jaw motion, soft blinking, Ghibli anime style with warm colors and hand-painted detail, realistic teeth with proper shape and spacing, fluid and lifelike head motion, cinematic lighting, 4K high quality.

rozen or barely moving lips, off-sync mouth movements, robotic or jerky animation, stiff or blank expressions, over-contoured or exaggerated teeth, unrealistic “three large teeth” look, distorted facial proportions, excessive mouth stretching, uncanny valley faces, flickering frames.
